title: Fluffy Fried Peruvian Jerusalem Artichokes Causa
description: A pillowy crowd-pleaser from Peru featuring tender Jerusalem artichokes and rich lardons-render sauce.

ingredients.name: Lardons
ingredients.notes: small pieces of pork fat or vegan alternative

instructions: Peel and cut the Jerusalem artichokes into 1/4-inch thick slices.
Heat the olive oil in a deep frying pan or a deep fryer to 350°F.
Fry the lardons in batches until golden brown, then set aside on paper towels.
Fry the Jerusalem artichoke slices in batches until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fried artichoke slices on paper towels and sprinkle with salt.
Mix the fried artichokes with the fried lardons, chopped cilantro, chickpeas, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
In a small bowl, whisk together the white vinegar and lime juice.
Pour the dressing over the artichoke mixture and toss to coat.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
